title: Optimised and Reworked
description: Modpack focused, not only on optimisation , but also on gamplay expirience
body:
##  Optimisation
Optimised and Reworked improves minecraft perfomance and memory usage with such mods as Sodium, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, Dynamic FPS, EntityCulling, ImmediatelyFast, Lithium, 
ModernFix, Exordium, More Culling, ScalableLux and Sodium extra
## Improvements
- Adds a visualization of saturation and exhaustion to the HUD
- Replaces the Vanilla statistics screen with an new and improved statistics screen
- Improves third person camera view
- Lets you see your held items when in a moving boat
- Adds player heads next to their chat messages
- Lets you click through signs and item frames
- Lets you return to the Title Screen early while your world is still saving in the background
- Adds shaders support
- Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
- Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed
- Removes small gaps in item and block models
- Increases the length of the chat history
- Enhances the inventory management by adding various additional functions to the usual mouse buttons
- Removes chat reports
- Lets you see what is in shulker box
- Adds zoom
